title: Implement Hook System for Tool and Agent Lifecycle Events
description: Add support for hooks similar to Python SDK - PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SubagentStop, UserPromptSubmit, Stop, PreCompact. Should include HookCallback type, HookMatcher with patterns, and async hook execution.

title: Enable Dynamic Model Switching Mid-Conversation
description: Implement set_model() equivalent to allow switching between models during a conversation via control protocol.

title: Expose Control Protocol for Bidirectional SDK Communication
description: Parse and route control protocol messages (SDKControlRequest/Response) to SDK consumers. Enable hook callbacks, permission requests, and dynamic configuration changes.

title: Add Tool Permission Callback Support (can_use_tool)
description: Implement CanUseTool callback that allows dynamic permission decisions before tool execution. Should support PermissionResultAllow/Deny and permission suggestions.

title: Enable Dynamic Permission Mode Changes
description: Implement set_permission_mode() to change permission settings during execution without restarting.

title: Support Custom Agent Definitions
description: Add AgentDefinition type with custom prompts, tool restrictions, and model selection (sonnet/opus/haiku/inherit). Pass via CLI options.

title: Implement SubagentStop Hook for Background Agent Tracking
description: Specific hook that fires when a subagent/Task tool completes. Critical for tracking background agent lifecycle and coordinating multi-agent workflows.
